description: Supplier master table used by Oracle Purchasing and referenced throughout Procure to Pay. Each record represents a supplier entity and stores supplier identity, payment defaults, tax reporting information, control flags, and relationships used by purchasing, payables, and supplier management processes.

columns.name: VENDOR_ID
columns.description: Unique system-generated identifier for the supplier. Used to relate supplier transactions, sites, invoices, and payments.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was last updated.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that last updated the record.

columns.name: VENDOR_NAME
columns.description: Business name of the supplier.

columns.name: VENDOR_NAME_ALT
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: SEGMENT1
columns.description: Primary supplier number segment used as the business supplier identifier.

columns.name: SUMMARY_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether summary applies to the record.

columns.name: ENABLED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether enabled applies to the record.

columns.name: SEGMENT2
columns.description: Flexfield segment 2 used to capture business classification or numbering information.

columns.name: SEGMENT3
columns.description: Flexfield segment 3 used to capture business classification or numbering information.

columns.name: SEGMENT4
columns.description: Flexfield segment 4 used to capture business classification or numbering information.

columns.name: SEGMENT5
columns.description: Flexfield segment 5 used to capture business classification or numbering information.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.description: Login session identifier that performed the last update.

columns.name: CREATION_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was created.

columns.name: CREATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that created the record.

columns.name: EMPLOYEE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related employee record.

columns.name: VENDOR_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying vendor type lookup for the record.

columns.name: CUSTOMER_NUM
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence customer.

columns.name: ONE_TIME_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether one time applies to the record.

columns.name: PARENT_VENDOR_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related parent vendor record.

columns.name: MIN_ORDER_AMOUNT
columns.description: Monetary amount representing min order for the transaction.

columns.name: TERMS_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the payment terms definition applied to the transaction.

columns.name: SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
columns.description: Ledger identifier in which accounting entries are recorded.

columns.name: ALWAYS_TAKE_DISC_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether always take disc applies to the record.

columns.name: PAY_DATE_BASIS_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying pay date basis lookup for the record.

columns.name: PAY_GROUP_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying pay group lookup for the record.

columns.name: PAYMENT_PRIORITY
columns.description: Processing priority used when selecting transactions for payment.

columns.name: INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE
columns.description: Currency in which the supplier invoice was entered.

columns.name: PAYMENT_CURRENCY_CODE
columns.description: Currency used when payment is made or settled.

columns.name: INVOICE_AMOUNT_LIMIT
columns.description: Maximum invoice amount allowed based on the supplier or site control setup.

columns.name: HOLD_ALL_PAYMENTS_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether hold all payments applies to the record.

columns.name: HOLD_FUTURE_PAYMENTS_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether hold future payments applies to the record.

columns.name: HOLD_REASON
columns.description: Reason explaining why the supplier site, invoice, or payment record was placed on hold.

columns.name: NUM_1099
columns.description: 1099-related tax reporting attribute used for statutory supplier reporting.

columns.name: INDIVIDUAL_1099
columns.description: 1099-related tax reporting attribute used for statutory supplier reporting.

columns.name: TYPE_1099
columns.description: 1099 reporting classification assigned to the supplier transaction for statutory reporting.

columns.name: WITHHOLDING_STATUS_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying withholding status lookup for the record.

columns.name: WITHHOLDING_START_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with withholding start.

columns.name: ORGANIZATION_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying organization type lookup for the record.

columns.name: START_DATE_ACTIVE
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: END_DATE_ACTIVE
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: MINORITY_GROUP_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying minority group lookup for the record.

columns.name: WOMEN_OWNED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether women owned applies to the record.

columns.name: SMALL_BUSINESS_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether small business applies to the record.

columns.name: STANDARD_INDUSTRY_CLASS
columns.description: Classification assigned to standard industry.

columns.name: HOLD_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether the transaction or schedule is on hold from further processing.

columns.name: PURCHASING_HOLD_REASON
columns.description: Business reason captured for purchasing hold.

columns.name: HOLD_BY
columns.description: User or person responsible for hold.

columns.name: HOLD_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with hold.

columns.name: TERMS_DATE_BASIS
columns.description: Basis used to determine which date should drive payment term calculation.

columns.name: INSPECTION_REQUIRED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether inspection required applies to the record.

columns.name: RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether receipt required applies to the record.

columns.name: QTY_RCV_TOLERANCE
columns.description: Tolerance threshold used to control qty rcv tolerance.

columns.name: QTY_RCV_EXCEPTION_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying qty rcv exception for the record.

columns.name: ENFORCE_SHIP_TO_LOCATION_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying enforce ship to location for the record.

columns.name: DAYS_EARLY_RECEIPT_ALLOWED
columns.description: Allowed number or value for days early receipt.

columns.name: DAYS_LATE_RECEIPT_ALLOWED
columns.description: Allowed number or value for days late receipt.

columns.name: RECEIPT_DAYS_EXCEPTION_CODE
columns.description: Lookup or classification code identifying receipt days exception for the record.

columns.name: RECEIVING_ROUTING_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related receiving routing record.

columns.name: ALLOW_SUBSTITUTE_RECEIPTS_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether allow substitute receipts applies to the record.

columns.name: ALLOW_UNORDERED_RECEIPTS_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether allow unordered receipts applies to the record.

columns.name: HOLD_UNMATCHED_INVOICES_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether hold unmatched invoices applies to the record.

columns.name: TAX_VERIFICATION_DATE
columns.description: Business date associated with tax verification.

columns.name: NAME_CONTROL
columns.description: Business attribute of the supplier used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: STATE_REPORTABLE_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether state reportable applies to the record.

columns.name: FEDERAL_REPORTABLE_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether federal reportable applies to the record.

columns.name: REQUEST_ID
columns.description: Concurrent request identifier for the program run that created or updated the record.

columns.name: PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID
columns.description: Oracle application identifier for the concurrent program that last updated the record.

columns.name: PROGRAM_ID
columns.description: Concurrent program identifier for the process that last updated the record.

columns.name: PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the concurrent program last updated the record.

columns.name: VAT_REGISTRATION_NUM
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence vat registration.

columns.name: AUTO_CALCULATE_INTEREST_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether auto calculate interest applies to the record.

columns.name: VALIDATION_NUMBER
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence validation nu.

columns.name: EXCLUDE_FREIGHT_FROM_DISCOUNT
columns.description: Indicates whether freight charges are excluded when payment discounts are calculated.

columns.name: TAX_REPORTING_NAME
columns.description: Business name associated with tax reporting.

columns.name: CHECK_DIGITS
columns.description: Check digits used to validate the business reference or external account number.

columns.name: ALLOW_AWT_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether allow awt applies to the record.

columns.name: AWT_GROUP_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the withholding tax group applied to the transaction.

columns.name: BANK_CHARGE_BEARER
columns.description: Indicates which party bears bank charges associated with the payment or receipt settlement.

columns.name: MATCH_OPTION
columns.description: Matching control option that determines whether invoice matching is performed at purchase order or receipt level.

columns.name: CREATE_DEBIT_MEMO_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether create debit memo applies to the record.

columns.name: PARTY_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the Trading Community Architecture party associated with the record.

columns.name: PARENT_PARTY_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related parent party record.

columns.name: NI_NUMBER
columns.description: Business number used to identify or sequence ni nu.

columns.name: PARTY_NUMBER
columns.description: Business reference number assigned to the Trading Community party.

columns.name: PAY_AWT_GROUP_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related pay awt group record.

business_questions: Show supplier master records and supplier classification details.
Find suppliers used on Payables invoices.
Display supplier payment defaults and withholding settings.
Show suppliers by supplier number, name, or party reference.
Identify suppliers on hold for purchasing or payment.
List suppliers by type, tax reporting status, or payment priority.
Show active and inactive supplier records.
Find suppliers associated with a specific party or parent supplier.
